title: Sequential processing limits in n8n non-Enterprise plans
symptom: Webhooks are processed one at a time, causing delays and queuing of executions in high-volume scenarios.
applies_when: Running multiple automations that rely on webhook triggers
not_this_if: Using an Enterprise plan that allows parallel processing
root_cause: n8n's non-Enterprise plans process incoming webhooks sequentially, which limits the ability to handle multiple concurrent executions efficiently, leading to performance bottlenecks.
fix_steps: Set up a self-hosted instance of n8n to enable parallel processing of webhooks.
Use a deployment solution like Railways to configure workers for handling webhooks concurrently.
agent_instruction: Transition to a self-hosted n8n instance to enable parallel processing of webhooks.
